INSERT INTO PLHS.dbo.tbl_LCM_TCOO_Diff_Intraday_Archive
( [PLHIS Contact]
      ,[PLHIS Updated Date]
      ,[Notes]
      ,[Ramservername]
      ,[Lcmstatus]
      ,[TCOOStatus]
      ,[TCOOMigrationStatus]
      ,[Ciodirectname]
      ,[Primarytechmgr]
      ,[Managedbygroup]
      ,[Primary Applicatioin]
      ,[Environment]
      ,[Cio]
      ,[Ciodirect]
      ,[Cistatus]
      ,[Rtstatus]
      ,[Rtplannedactivity]
      ,[Fundingdate]
      ,[Rtdecomdate]
      ,[Rtplancertifieddate]
      ,[Hweoldate]
      ,[Applicationids]
      ,[Normalizedos]
      ,[Eol Hw Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2022]
      ,[Cioname]
      ,[Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023]
      ,[Productname]
      ,[Hds Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2024]
      ,[sourceCIOdirName]
      ,[TCOO Extension Aggregated]
      ,[NewSourceLCM_AsOf]
      ,[ChangeNumber]
      ,[Decom_Date]
      ,[Extension_Date]
      ,[ISPNumber]
      ,[Import_date]
)
SELECT [PLHIS Contact]
      ,[PLHIS Updated Date]
      ,[Notes]
      ,[Ramservername]
      ,[Lcmstatus]
      ,[TCOOStatus]
      ,[TCOOMigrationStatus]
      ,[Ciodirectname]
      ,[Primarytechmgr]
      ,[Managedbygroup]
      ,[Primary Applicatioin]
      ,[Environment]
      ,[Cio]
      ,[Ciodirect]
      ,[Cistatus]
      ,[Rtstatus]
      ,[Rtplannedactivity]
      ,[Fundingdate]
      ,[Rtdecomdate]
      ,[Rtplancertifieddate]
      ,[Hweoldate]
      ,[Applicationids]
      ,[Normalizedos]
      ,[Eol Hw Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2022]
      ,[Cioname]
      ,[Vm On Hds2022 Esx Depthru 2023]
      ,[Productname]
      ,[Hds Thru 2023]
      ,[Hds Thru 2024]
      ,[sourceCIOdirName]
      ,[TCOO Extension Aggregated]
      ,[NewSourceLCM_AsOf]
      ,[ChangeNumber]
      ,[Decom_Date]
      ,[Extension_Date]
      ,[ISPNumber]
      ,[Import_date]
  FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_LCM_TCOO_Diff_Intraday]
select replace(cast(cast(getdate() as time) as nvarchar(8)),':','_')

update tbl_LCM_PrevWeek_ScopeTracker  
set 
Notes = b.Notes
,TCOOMigrationStatus = B.TCOOMigrationStatus
,TCOOStatus = B.TCOOStatus
,Lcmstatus = B.Lcmstatus
,Ciodirectname = B.Ciodirectname
,Primarytechmgr = B.Primarytechmgr
,[PLHIS Contact] = b.[PLHIS Contact]
,[Cistatus] = b.[Cistatus]
,Import_date = B.Import_date
,[TCOO Extension Aggregated] = b.[TCOO Extension Aggregated]
 ,[ISPNumber] = b.[ISPNumber]
,[ChangeNumber] = b.[ChangeNumber] 
 ,[Decom_Date] = b.[Decom_Date]
 ,[Extension_Date] = b.[Extension_Date] 
FROM tbl_LCM_PrevWeek_ScopeTracker A INNER JOIN  [tbl_LCM_TCOO_Diff_Intraday] B ON A.Ramservername = B.Ramservername
delete from dbo.tbl_LCM_NewWeek_Tracking where import_Date  = cast(getdate() as date)
select replace(cast(cast(getdate() as time) as nvarchar(8)),':','_')

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Dataflow_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name_LCM_File' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Dataflow_Name_LCM_File,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pipeline_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Pipeline_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Src_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Src_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Src_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Tgt_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Tgt_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Tgt_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Tgt_Table_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Tgt_Schema_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Src_Container_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Src_filename_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Src_path_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Tgt_Container_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Tgt_filename_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Tgt_path_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Tgt_Table_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS Tgt_Schema_Name_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Archive_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Archive_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Archive_filename' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Archive_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Archive_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS Archive_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'GMD_filename' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS GMD_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'GMD_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS GMD_path_Name,
	(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'GMD_filename_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS GMD_filename_1,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'GMD_path_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectNewLCMFile') AS GMD_path_Name_1,
	(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'GMD_filename_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS GMD_filename_2,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'GMD_path_Name_2' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Extract_Prev_Week_CollectUpdates') AS GMD_path_Name_2,
	(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name_3' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow') AS Src_Container_Name_3,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_3' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow') AS Src_filename_3,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name_3' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow') AS Src_path_Name_3,
	(SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name_3' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow') AS Tgt_filename_3,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name_3' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow') AS Tgt_path_Name_3,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name_3' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_LCM_ScopeAnalysis_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Data_Flow') AS Tgt_Container_Name_3
;

scripts.text:
delete
  FROM [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_LCM_PlanningWeekly]

where import_Date  = cast(getdate() as date)
select replace(cast(cast(getdate() as time) as nvarchar(8)),':','_') as TimeStamp
